steps.title: Spot the defining description
steps.content: The colon signals elaboration. The passage describes the delta as “constantly evolving” with channels and land that “change in size and shape” — the defining signal is constant transformation.

steps.title: Match the word to the transformation
steps.content:
Dynamic means characterized by continuous change and motion, exactly what a network described as “constantly evolving” and changing shape exhibits.

The other three denote permanence, sustainability, or superiority—none fit the passage's focus on ongoing transformation.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
